x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Surfaces the Brooklyn DA content that already exists (press releases, programs, community resources, victim services), proposes the aggregate case-statistics the office publishes nowhere, and adds submit_tip — the net-new inbound write workflow that today has only a captcha web form or a phone call. Because all five NYC county DA offices share these functions, this is a template for one shared DA MCP server.

server.name: io.nyc.brooklynda
server.title: Brooklyn District Attorney (Kings County)
server.description: Agent-native access to the Kings County (Brooklyn) District Attorney's Office — press releases, programs and bureaus, community resources, and victim services drawn from brooklynda.org (a WordPress site whose only machine-readable surface is its accidental REST API), the aggregate case statistics the office does not yet publish, plus the net-new ability to submit and track a confidential tip. No NYC Open Data exists for any DA office; individual cases and defendant records are never exposed.
server.instructions: Use find_press_releases / get_press_release to search the ~911 press releases, statements, and notifications (the office's only substantial published data). find_programs / get_program cover bureaus, units, diversion and re-entry programs, community courts, and initiatives. find_community_resources returns brochures, palm cards, guides, and hotlines (often in multiple languages). find_victim_services covers advocacy, safety planning, court accompaniment, and notifications for people harmed by crime. find_case_statistics returns AGGREGATE prosecution figures ONLY — never individual cases or defendants — and note the office publishes none today, so this surface is proposed. submit_tip (net-new) files a confidential tip and mutates state — confirm the category and summary with the user first, remind them this channel is NOT for emergencies in progress (call 911), respect anonymity, and return the confidential reference number so they can check status with get_tip_status.

tools.name: find_press_releases
tools.title: Find Press Releases
tools.description: Search Brooklyn DA press releases, statements, and notifications by category, bureau, date range, and/or free text.

tools.name: get_press_release
tools.title: Get Press Release
tools.description: Fetch a single Brooklyn DA press release, statement, or notification by ID.

tools.name: find_programs
tools.title: Find Programs
tools.description: Search Brooklyn DA programs, bureaus, units, diversion / re-entry programs, community courts, and initiatives by type, bureau, audience, or free text.

tools.name: get_program
tools.title: Get Program
tools.description: Fetch a Brooklyn DA program, bureau, or unit by slug.

tools.name: find_community_resources
tools.title: Find Community Resources
tools.description: List Brooklyn DA public resources — brochures, palm cards, guides, and hotlines (elder abuse, human trafficking, tenant protection, deed fraud, anti-bullying, and more), often in multiple languages — by resource type, topic, language, or bureau.

tools.name: find_victim_services
tools.title: Find Victim Services
tools.description: List Brooklyn DA victim / witness support offerings — advocacy, safety planning, court accompaniment, case notification, compensation help, and language access — by service type, population served, bureau, or language.

tools.name: find_case_statistics
tools.title: Find Case Statistics
tools.description: Return AGGREGATE Brooklyn DA prosecution statistics (arraignments, dispositions, diversions, conviction-review outcomes) by period, bureau, and crime category. Never returns individual cases or defendants. NOTE: the office publishes none of this today — this is a proposed data surface.

tools.name: submit_tip
tools.title: Submit a Confidential Tip
tools.description: File a confidential tip, complaint, or information referral with the Brooklyn DA (report fraud, an unsafe landlord, a hate incident, trafficking, or information on an open matter). NET-NEW workflow with no public API today — it lives only behind a captcha web form, a phone hotline, or a bureau email. Mutates state — confirm category and summary first; this channel is NOT for emergencies in progress (set emergency=true only to steer the user to call 911); respect the submitter's anonymity.

tools.name: get_tip_status
tools.title: Get Tip Status
tools.description: Check the status of a previously submitted tip by its confidential reference number.

x-agent-skills.note: Each tool maps to one of the ten NYC common government-process Agent Skills via x-agent-skill.
